description: Port and adapt the lesson rendering engine (LessonStepper, PhaseRenderer, etc.) from bus-math-v2, integrating with the e-textbook design system and flexible phase model
deviation_notes: ActivityRenderer required creating lib/activities/registry.ts (not estimated); PhaseCompleteButton built directly on client helper instead of porting hook (no hook existed in IM3). Keyboard navigation added as Phase 4 task. Final: 444 tests.
